title: Transcribe Any Video in Seconds — 100+ Languages | Vocova AI
transcript: Copy a link from YouTube or any of 1000 platforms, paste it into Vokova and start transcribing. You can also drop any audio or video file. AI processes your audio in seconds, supporting 100 languages. Get accurate transcripts with timestamps, speaker labels and an AI-generated summary. Translate your transcript into 145 plus languages with one click. View original and translation side-by-side in bilingual mode. Edit text, speakers, and translations all in line, all in real-time. Export original, translation, or bilingual transcripts as PDF, SRT, DOCX, VTT, or plain text with TIM stamps and speakers preserved. Beautifully formatted, ready to share and archive.
